message:
feat: add comprehensive conformance, e2e, and edge-case test infrastructure

Conformance Framework (conformance_harness.rs +1483, error_code.rs +247):
- Deterministic conformance harness with structured test orchestration
- Canonical error code registry with severity classification
- IFC conformance runner updates for expanded test corpus

E2E Testing (e2e_harness.rs +908, benchmark_e2e.rs, security_e2e.rs):
- End-to-end test harness with environment isolation and cleanup
- Benchmark E2E integration testing for performance regression detection
- Security E2E scenarios for adversarial input handling

Test262 Compliance (test262_release_gate.rs):
- ES2020 profile gate with conformance pins and waivers
- Release blocking on test262 pass rate thresholds
- Constrained ambient benchmark lane for isolated measurements

Edge-Case Test Suites (15 new test files):
- adversarial_campaign_edge_cases/integration: Campaign fuzzing boundary tests
- capability_witness_edge_cases: Witness validation corner cases
- ifc_provenance_index_edge_cases: Information flow tracking boundaries
- object_model_edge_cases: Proxy/descriptor invariant violations
- parser_edge_cases: Malformed input and Unicode handling
- privacy_learning_contract_edge_cases: Privacy policy enforcement
- slot_registry_integration: Indexed property edge cases
- stress_concurrency: Multi-threaded engine stress tests

Extension Host Tests (4 new suites):
- comprehensive_unit_suite, delegate_cell_edge_cases, flow_control_and_ifc,
  lifecycle_edge_cases

IFC Corpus Updates:
- Updated exfiltration fixtures (covert, implicit, indirect, temporal scenarios)
- Refined expected outputs for declassify receipt and exfil blocking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
